heading: Omitted
label: 287f Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized the Department of State to acquire surplus property for the United Nations and authorized the reduction of the United States contribution to the United Nations by the value of the property acquired and expenses incidental thereto, was from the Department of State Appropriation Act, 1952, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts. Similar provisions were contained in , ch. III, title I, .act Oct. 22, 1951, ch. 533, title I65 Stat. 577act Sept. 6, 1950, ch. 89664 Stat. 610
